allow: PowerShell(Get-ChildItem -Recurse -Force prisma, supabase, .vercel -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Where-Object { -not $_.PSIsContainer } | Select-Object FullName)
Bash(python -c "import json,sys; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\('main:',d.get\('main'\)\); print\('exports keys:', list\(d.get\('exports',{}\).keys\(\)\)[:8]\)")

PowerShell(Get-ChildItem -Recurse -Force app, components, lib, prisma, proxy.ts, next.config.mjs, tailwind.config.ts, README.security.md, README.md, .env.example -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Where-Object { -not $_.PSIsContainer -and $_.FullName -notmatch 'node_modules|\\.next|generated' } | Select-Object FullName)

Bash(node -e "const a = JSON.stringify\({event:'payment.captured', payload:{x:1}}\); const b = JSON.stringify\(JSON.parse\(a\)\); console.log\('orig:', a\); console.log\('re  :', b\); console.log\('equal:', a===b\);")
Bash(powershell -Command "Get-Process node -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Stop-Process -Force; Start-Sleep -Seconds 2; Write-Host 'killed'")

Bash(powershell -Command "Test-NetConnection -ComputerName 127.0.0.1 -Port 51213 -InformationLevel Quiet -WarningAction SilentlyContinue; Test-NetConnection -ComputerName 127.0.0.1 -Port 51214 -InformationLevel Quiet -WarningAction SilentlyContinue")

Bash(powershell -Command "Test-NetConnection -ComputerName 127.0.0.1 -Port 51214 -InformationLevel Quiet -WarningAction SilentlyContinue; Test-NetConnection -ComputerName 127.0.0.1 -Port 51213 -InformationLevel Quiet -WarningAction SilentlyContinue")

Bash(nohup pnpm exec cross-env NODE_ENV=test E2E_AUTH_BYPASS=true ADMIN_EMAILS=e2e-admin@test.local NEXT_PUBLIC_SUPABASE_URL=http://stub NEXT_PUBLIC_SUPABASE_ANON_KEY=stub-anon-key-not-real DATABASE_URL=postgres://postgres:postgres@localhost:51214/template1?sslmode=disable pnpm dev -p 3102)

Bash(powershell -Command "Get-Process node -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Where-Object { \\$_.CommandLine -like '*next*3102*' -or \\$_.CommandLine -like '*3102*' } | Stop-Process -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; Start-Sleep -Seconds 1; Write-Host 'killed'")

Bash(powershell -Command "Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 3102 -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Format-Table OwningProcess; Get-Process -Id \(Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 3102 -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue\).OwningProcess -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Stop-Process -Force; Start-Sleep -Seconds 2; \(Test-NetConnection -ComputerName 127.0.0.1 -Port 3102 -InformationLevel Quiet -WarningAction SilentlyContinue\)")

Bash(powershell -Command "Get-Process node -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Where-Object { \\$_.CommandLine -match 'next' -or \\$_.CommandLine -match 'pnpm' } | Format-Table Id,ProcessName,CommandLine -AutoSize")

Bash(powershell -Command "Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 51213,51214 -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object OwningProcess,LocalPort,State | Sort-Object LocalPort | Get-Unique -AsString; Get-Process | Where-Object { \\$_.CommandLine -like '*prisma*dev*' } | Format-Table Id")

Bash(powershell -Command "Get-Process node -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Where-Object { \\$_.CommandLine -like '*next*' -or \\$_.CommandLine -like '*pnpm dev*' } | Stop-Process -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; Start-Sleep -Seconds 1; \(Test-NetConnection -ComputerName 127.0.0.1 -Port 3100 -InformationLevel Quiet -WarningAction SilentlyContinue\)")

Bash(powershell -Command "Get-Process node -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Where-Object { \\$_.CommandLine -like '*next*' -or \\$_.CommandLine -like '*pnpm dev*' } | Stop-Process -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; Start-Sleep -Seconds 1; \(Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 51214 -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue\).OwningProcess | ForEach-Object { Stop-Process -Id \\$_ -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue }; Write-Host 'cleaned'")
